# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create an Istio RequestAuthentication policy for JWT validation. Configure jwks and issuer settings to validate incoming tokens. Set up rules to extract JWT claims from Authorization headers. This is for our API authentication layer.
# Category: istio_jwt_validation_weak

apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: RequestAuthentication
metadata:
  name: jwt-authentication
  namespace: default
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: api-gateway
  jwtRules:
  - issuer: "https://auth.example.com"
    jwksUri: "https://auth.example.com/.well-known/jwks.json"
    audiences:
    - "api.example.com"
    - "https://api.example.com"
    forwardOriginalToken: true
    fromHeaders:
    - name: Authorization
      prefix: "Bearer "
    - name: X-Auth-Token
    fromParams:
    - "access_token"
    outputPayloadToHeader: "x-jwt-payload"
    outputClaimToHeaders:
    - header: "x-user-id"
      claim: "sub"
    - header: "x-user-email"
      claim: "email"
    - header: "x-user-roles"
      claim: "roles"
    - header: "x-tenant-id"
      claim: "tenant_id"
---
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: RequestAuthentication
metadata:
  name: jwt-authentication-multi-issuer
  namespace: default
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: api-gateway
  jwtRules:
  - issuer: "https://auth.example.com"
    jwksUri: "https://auth.example.com/.well-known/jwks.json"
    audiences:
    - "api.example.com"
    forwardOriginalToken: true
    fromHeaders:
    - name: Authorization
      prefix: "Bearer "
    outputClaimToHeaders:
    - header: "x-user-id"
      claim: "sub"
    - header: "x-user-email"
      claim: "email"
    - header: "x-user-roles"
      claim: "roles"
  - issuer: "https://partner-auth.example.com"
    jwksUri: "https://partner-auth.example.com/.well-known/jwks.json"
    audiences:
    - "partner-api.example.com"
    forwardOriginalToken: true
    fromHeaders:
    - name: X-Partner-Token
      prefix: "Bearer "
    outputClaimToHeaders:
    - header: "x-partner-id"
      claim: "partner_id"
    - header: "x-partner-name"
      claim: "name"
---
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: require-jwt
  namespace: default
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: api-gateway
  action: ALLOW
  rules:
  - from:
    - source:
        requestPrincipals: ["*"]
    to:
    - operation:
        methods: ["GET", "POST", "PUT", "DELETE", "PATCH"]
        paths: ["/api/*"]
    when:
    - key: request.auth.claims[email]
      notValues: [""]
---
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: public-endpoints
  namespace: default
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: api-gateway
  action: ALLOW
  rules:
  - to:
    - operation:
        paths: ["/health", "/ready", "/metrics", "/public/*"]
